summary: Phase 3.7k GO-LIVE Testing Complete. All critical login flows work for all 5 roles (staff, applicant, partner, admin, teacher). Backend: 15/15 tests passed. Frontend: All major features verified. Cookie-based auth with SameSite=none, Secure=true working correctly.

minor.issue: Endpoint returns 404 - but frontend uses /api/users/{id} instead, so this is not blocking

issues: Navigation shows English (Dashboard, Documents, Messages) even though user language_pref is 'de'. This may be intentional for international students but worth noting.

critical_code_review_comments: ✓ CRITICAL LOGIN BUG FIXED: All 5 roles can login without 'Ein Fehler ist aufgetreten' error
✓ Cookie auth working: SameSite=none, Secure=true, httponly cookies set correctly
✓ Login redirects correct: staff→/staff, applicant→/portal, affiliate→/partner, admin→/staff (with Admin tab), teacher→/staff (teacher dashboard)
✓ SEO: All public pages have proper meta titles (not 'React App')
✓ Partner Portal: Dashboard shows stats, Referrals shows table (empty state), Referral Link has copy button, Settings works
✓ AI Screening: 'KI-Prüfung starten' button prominently visible on applicant detail page
✓ Messaging UI: Applicant /portal/messages - chat fills height, input anchored at bottom
✓ Messaging UI: Staff /staff/messaging - conversation list on left, chat area on right
✓ CORS: API responds correctly without Origin header (same-origin requests work)
Note: Admin password is 'Admin@2026!' not 'DevSeed@2026!' - update test_credentials.md if needed
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 3.7k GO-LIVE complete. All login flows work. REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL is now empty string (relative URLs for same-origin). Cookie settings: COOKIE_SECURE=true, COOKIE_SAMESITE=none. Admin uses different password (Admin@2026!) than other dev accounts (DevSeed@2026!). Partner settings page uses /api/users/{id} endpoint, not a dedicated /api/partner/settings endpoint.

Backend: Staff login returns staff role
Backend: Applicant login returns applicant role
Backend: Partner login returns affiliate role
Backend: Admin login returns superadmin role (password: Admin@2026!)
Backend: Teacher login returns teacher role

Backend: GET /api/partner/referrals returns list
Backend: GET /api/partner/referral-link returns link with ref code
Backend: POST /api/applications/{id}/accept-ai-suggestion works
Backend: Cookie auth works (/api/auth/me returns user)
Backend: CORS works without Origin header
Frontend: Homepage loads with proper SEO title

Frontend: Staff login redirects to /staff
Frontend: Applicant login redirects to /portal
Frontend: Partner login redirects to /partner
Frontend: Admin login redirects to /staff (with Admin tab visible)
Frontend: Teacher login redirects to /staff (teacher dashboard)
Frontend: Partner dashboard shows stats (Total Referrals, Active, Enrolled)
Frontend: Partner referrals page shows table/empty state
Frontend: Partner referral link page has Copy button
Frontend: Partner settings page works (uses /api/users/{id})
Frontend: Applicant messaging - chat fills height, input at bottom
Frontend: Staff messaging - conversation list visible
Frontend: AI Screening button 'KI-Prüfung starten' visible on applicant detail

mocked_apis.ai_screening_inference: May return mock results if NSCall key issues

notes: GO-LIVE ready. All critical login flows work. Cookie banner must be dismissed before login. Onboarding tour modal appears for applicants on first visit.
